summary: Frontend-only Playwright testing of GAIA Restaurant Rating SPA. All 11 scenarios from the review request executed and passed: English default, AR/RTL language toggle (placeholder + dir + label), validation errors (no waiter / no rating), 5-star flow opens Google Maps URL via window.open and persists to localStorage, 3-star flow shows Thank-You modal and persists, hidden Staff Login with wrong/correct password (1234), Owner Dashboard stats (total=2, avg=4.00, waiters=6) and bilingual labels, logout returns to customer view, mobile 414x900 has no horizontal scroll and submit is full-width, and SuspendedView component with data-testid='suspended-en'/'suspended-ar' is present in source for the !isAccountActive branch.
critical_code_review_comments: All requested data-testids are present and stable.
window.open uses 'noopener,noreferrer' correctly to avoid tabnabbing.
loadReviews()/saveReview() are wrapped in try/catch for localStorage failures (private mode safe).
Minor: STORAGE_KEY review IDs use Date.now()+random — fine for client-side uniqueness.
Minor: GOOGLE_MAPS_REVIEW_URL still has the placeholder placeid 'ChIJN1t_tDeuEmsRUsoyG83frY4' — needs to be replaced with GAIA Dubai's actual Place ID before production.
Minor: dashboard reviews list is memoized with [] deps so it does not refresh if a new review arrives while dashboard is open; acceptable since dashboard is mounted on login.
Minor: language toggle button at top-right may overlap waiter card edges on very small AR viewports — visually fine in 414 width test.
test_credentials: Staff dashboard password: 1234 (verified working). /app/memory/test_credentials.md not present — flagging.
seed_data_creation: Tests created 2 localStorage reviews (1x 5★ for w1, 1x 3★ for w2) under key 'gaia_reviews_v1'. Storage was cleared at start of test run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is a pure-frontend SPA with localStorage. Use spy on window.open BEFORE clicking submit to detect 4-5 star Google Maps redirect (real popups are usually blocked in headless and page.expect_popup() will time out when window.open returns null after spying). Storage key 'gaia_reviews_v1', lang key 'gaia_lang_v1'. Password '1234'. To test SuspendedView, would need to flip /app/frontend/src/App.js line 9 (const isAccountActive = false) and reload — component code verified present.
verified_scenarios: English default UI with brand GAIA, eyebrow, tagline, 6 waiter cards, 5 empty stars, feedback placeholder 'Share your experience...', Submit Review button
Language toggle: html dir='rtl', toggle label flips to 'English', AR placeholder 'اكتب ملاحظاتك هنا...', toggling again reverts to LTR/EN
Submit without waiter -> form-error: 'Please select a waiter first.'
Submit with waiter but no rating -> form-error: 'Please select a rating.'
5-star submit -> window.open called with https://search.google.com/local/writereview?placeid=ChIJN1t_tDeuEmsRUsoyG83frY4 target=_blank, review saved to localStorage, form reset
3-star submit -> NO window.open, ThankYou modal visible, review persisted, dismiss button closes modal and resets form
Staff Login -> wrong password shows 'Incorrect password' via data-testid='password-error'; '1234' navigates to dashboard
Dashboard stats: stat-total=2, stat-average=4.00, stat-waiters=6; per-waiter breakdown table and recent feedback table render
Language toggle on dashboard translates labels (إجمالي التقييمات etc.)
Logout returns to customer view with brand visible
Mobile 414x900: scrollWidth==clientWidth (no horizontal scroll), submit button width 366 (full minus padding), star-5 visible
SuspendedView component present in App.js with data-testid='suspended-en' and 'suspended-ar' bilingual messages
